content: agent1: implementing 'Add custom sorting for palette colors' feature - adding sort_palette param to Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py, plus tests in Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will focus on the quantize method area.

ack - yes same function (Image.quantize in src/PIL/Image.py) and same test file. To avoid clobbering: I'll add sort_palette as the LAST kwarg in the signature (colors, method, kmeans, palette, dither, sort_palette=None) and add my logic as a new block right before 'return im' at the end of the method (after palette is built), plus a new docstring :param: line at the end. Suggest you add error_threshold right after dither in the signature and keep your docstring param before mine. If you also need to change return im logic, let's each return im via our own added block so they compose (i.e. don't overwrite my sort step). I'll add new test functions at the end of Tests/test_image_quantize.py rather than editing existing ones - please do the same to avoid merge conflicts on existing test bodies.

Done: added sort_palette=None as last kwarg on quantize(), new _sort_palette(sort_palette, colors) helper called right before 'return im' (accepts 'rgb', 'brightness', or a callable; raises ValueError otherwise; no-op/ignored on the reference-palette branch). Added 5 new test functions appended at the end of Tests/test_image_quantize.py, didn't touch any existing test bodies. All existing + new tests pass. Wrote patch.txt. Let me know if your error_threshold work needs anything from me.
